final_source:
build for javascript backend

create a Messages table:
  message, required
  timestamp, auto_date

when user sends data to /api/broadcast:
  requires login
  saved = save data to Messages
  send back saved

subscribe to 'updates':
  broadcast to all 'message_sent'
